# springlock

> A production-grade distributed locking service built with Spring Boot 4.0.3 and Java 21 LTS.

springlock provides distributed lock management for microservices using multiple pluggable backends.

## Modules

- [lock-service/](lock-service/) — Core Spring Boot 4 service: REST API, JPA entities, repository layer, and Redis integration
- [test-fixtures/](test-fixtures/) — Testcontainers fixtures for PostgreSQL (14–18), Citus (pg17), and Redis

## Backends

| Profile    | Backend                           | Notes                                  |
|------------|-----------------------------------|----------------------------------------|
| `h2`       | H2 in-memory                      | Fast local development and unit tests  |
| `postgres` | PostgreSQL 14–18 / Citus (pg17)   | Advisory locks and table-based locking |
| `redis`    | Redis                             | High-throughput in-memory locking      |

## Build & Run

```bash
# Requires Java 21 and Gradle wrapper
./gradlew build                    # Build all modules
./gradlew test                     # Unit tests (H2 in-memory, no Docker required)
./gradlew integrationTest          # Integration tests (requires Docker Desktop)
```
